title: oauth2-proxy health check User-Agent matching bypasses authentication
description: isHealthCheckRequest treats a request as a health check whenever the configured User-Agent matches, regardless of path. In auth_request integrations a forwarded auth subrequest carries the client's User-Agent, so any client sending the configured ping/gcp User-Agent (e.g. GoogleHC/1.0) is treated as a healthy probe and bypasses authentication entirely. The fix requires the path AND user-agent to both match.
